ticket_text: Customer conversation summary: Customer complains about app crashes and confusing new layout. Agent acknowledges widespread issue and expects patch within two weeks.
conversation_snippet:
Customer: I just want to say your new app update is terrible.
Agent: I'm sorry you feel that way. What specific issues are you experiencing?
Customer: It crashes constantly and the new layout is confusing.
Agent: We've received similar feedback. Our development team is working on a fix.
Customer: When will the fix be available?
Agent: We expect a patch within the next two weeks.
